# KRA eTIMS Error Code Reference — Linkd TaxID

This is the authoritative community reference for KRA eTIMS OSCU and VSCU API result codes.

## What this covers

Official KRA result codes from OSCU/VSCU Specification Document v2.0 §4.18:
- 000: Success (also emitted as "00" by VSCU JAR and "0000" by GavaConnect)
- 001: No search result — empty set, not a failure
- 891–899: Client-side SCU library faults
- 900: Missing required HTTP header
- 901: Device not valid — dvcSrlNo not registered with KRA
- 902: Device already installed — idempotent, not a hard failure
- 903: Device type mismatch — OSCU serial on VSCU endpoint or vice versa
- 910: Request parameter error — malformed or missing field including cmcKey
- 911: Empty request body
- 912: Endpoint routing mismatch
- 921: Sales invoice sequence violation — saveInvoice called before saveSales (VSCU only)
- 922: Invoice ordering error — reverse sequence violation
- 990: Rate limiting on fetch endpoints
- 991–993: Server-side database write/update/delete failures
- 994: Duplicate record — treat as idempotent success in retry scenarios
- 995: File retrieval failure
- 999: KRA catch-all unknown error

Production-observed codes absent from official spec:
- E04: Device/Branch Not Found
- E11: VSCU Memory Full
- 0000: Success variant observed in GavaConnect responses
- 905: OSCU-only device verification error, undocumented VSCU variant of 903

## Critical integration facts

KRA emits three success codes: "00" (VSCU JAR), "000" (OSCU spec), "0000" (GavaConnect).
GavaConnect returns HTTP 200 for all application failures — always check resultCd in the body.
Code 001 is not an error — it means empty result set.
VSCU requires two-step sales sequence (saveSales then saveInvoice). OSCU uses one combined call.
cmcKey is issued once, never rotated — never log it.
KRA spec §4.1 tax table contradicts its own JSON samples — fetch rates from selectCodes at runtime.
The VSCU stops issuing receipt numbers at 24 hours with no warning signal.
Invoice numbers must be sequential integers — never strings, never reused.

## Maintained by

Linkd TaxID — https://github.com/Linkd-TaxID/kra-etims-sdk
